product.description:
Self-propulsion for easy maneuverbility

self-traction system makes movement effortless during cleaning; and with a flexible brush head and advanced swivel steering, cleaning hard-to-reach areas is a breeze.
saves time and effort
vacuum and wash at the same time. Clean wet and dry messes on sealed floor types such as including hardwood, tile, laminate, vinyl, and marble.

dual-tank system

eureka’s dual-tank system keeps clean and dirty water separate, you’re always cleaning with fresh water. No more pushing around dirty water like with a traditional mop.

easy maintenance

never touch a dirty roller again. The hands-free self-cleaning function automatically flushes the inner tubing and brush roller, for fast, mess-free maintenance.
pet family friendly - powerful sterilizing liquid that can eliminate odors and is suitable for pet families.
noise reduction design - quadruple noise reduction, about 80dba low noise
easy storage - equipped with a base for storing both the cordless vacuum mop cleaner and accessories together for easy and tidy storage
stop when standing upright - when you place the floor cleaner machine in the upright position, it will automatically stop working, no need to press the button, simply use and stop
multi-surface cleaning - strong suction of eureka cordless vacuum and mop combo can aid in the removal of debris and stains from hard floors, marble, and ceramic in the kitchen, bedroom, and bathroom, among other places
self-cleaning system - the rolling brush and tube are self-cleaned without making your hands dirty
self-traction system for easy maneuverability - the self-traction system facilitates effortless movement during cleaning
up to 30 minutes of runtime - the durable battery provides up to 30 minutes of cordless cleaning power.
water tank release with a single button - two separate tanks; one for fresh water and one for dirty water. The .6l clean water tank is enough to clean the whole house without changing the water

product.description:
- 90° Swivel Design – Enhances left-right flexibility, reducing hand strain by 50% for a more comfortable and effortless cleaning experience.
- 3-Chamber Dirty Water Separation Ensures Strong Suction Even in a Flat Position: Tineco's exclusive 3-chamber dirty water separation efficiently separates solids, liquids, and air. It isolates wastewater to protect the motor and maintains full cleaning power even when laid flat.
- MHCBS Technology – Keeps floors spotless by recycling dirty water with an advanced scraper while continuously washing with fresh water 450 times per minute.
- 85°C FlashDry Self-Cleaning System
Step 1: Heated Water Self-Cleaning – Uses 85°C fresh water to break down stains and thoroughly clean pipes and the brush roller.
Step 2: 5 mins High-Temperature Drying – Dries all components with 85°C hot air, preventing moisture buildup, odors, and bacteria for superior hygiene. The sealed base design enhances drying efficiency by minimizing heat loss.

metaData.Key Information:
- Unmatched 22kPa Suction Power & 50-Min Runtime – Deep cleans with industry-leading suction while offering extended runtime for uninterrupted cleaning.
- 180° Ultra-Slim Flat-Lay Design – Compresses to just 12.85cm, gliding effortlessly under beds, sofas, and low-clearance areas, ensuring no dust or hair is left behind.
- DualBlock Anti-Tangle System – A front hair comb prevents tangles, while a straight scraper applies consistent pressure to remove hair and dirty water, leaving a streak-free finish.
- Warranty: 2 Years
- Safety Mark: 121578-12

product.description: As with all Kärcher products, the bagless VC 3 Plus multi-cyclone vacuum cleaner features outstanding functionality. With its elegant design and practical size, the VC 3 Plus fits perfectly into the modern Asian family home. Easy to use, it is suitable for both young and older people. The highly efficient multi-cyclone vacuum cleaner offers consistent high power without loss of suction and, thanks to the washable waste container, it saves you a great deal of money that you would otherwise have to spend on replacement filter bags. The transparent waste container enables you to see the vacuumed dirt, and therefore also the powerful cleaning effect, at a glance. HEPA 12 filters with minimal dust emissions ensure extremely clean air – ideal for allergy sufferers. What's more, the VC 3 Plus is particularly quiet, making it extremely family-friendly. The Kärcher VC 3 Plus cleans floorsand carpets just as thoroughly as gaps, corners, edges and other hard-to-reach areas.

product.description:
OZMO ROLLER Instant Self-Washing Mopping Technology (16x more cleaning pressure).
• The DEEBOT T80 OMNI features the OZMO ROLLER Instant Self-Washing Mopping Technology to deliver a more powerful mopping experience, effectively scrubbing and removing stains from the floor with a mopping pressure intensity of 3,700 Pa—more than 16 times* the pressure of leading dual-plate mopping and vibrating flat mopping technologies currently available on the market. Clean water is returned to the mop to keep it fresh after wastewater is scraped off. With up to 200 rpm rolling speed, this equates to 200 high-speed scrubbing and rinsing actions per minute, effectively preventing streaks and cross-contamination. With a smaller contact area, the mop applies more concentrated pressure to achieve a significant cleaning effect on stains.
---
TruEdge 2.0 + TruEdge 3D Edge Sensor.
• The upgraded TruEdge 2.0 allows the roller mop to extend dynamically during edge cleaning to maximise coverage at edges and corners. Furthermore, combined with an enhanced sensory algorithm and the brand-new TruEdge 3D Edge Sensor, the continuously variable roller mop can adapt to different types of edges and turns, precisely avoiding collisions while remaining close to edges. In addition, the side brush is constantly extended on a solid structure to reach blind spots in corners, achieving up to 99% coverage*.
---
Dynamic 18,000Pa Suction Power.
• Powered by an ultra-high-speed fan, the DEEBOT T80 OMNI delivers 18,000 Pa of suction power to achieve breakthrough sweeping and suction performance.
---
New ZeroTangle 3.0 Technology.
• Featuring an upgraded ARClean Anti-Tangle Side Brush and an advanced Triple-V Anti-Tangle Structure. The golden spiral design, combined with a single-prong dual-cluster and inward-curved bristles, effectively prevents hair tangling while enhancing the side brush's cleaning performance. Additionally, the 45° V-shaped bristle configuration prevents hair from becoming trapped on the main brush, while the spiral main brush and comb teeth ensure smooth untangling. Users can enjoy efficient suction, easy maintenance, and immaculate floors with the DEEBOT T80 OMNI.
---
AIVI 3D 3.0 Real-Time Obstacle Avoidance.
• The AIVI 3D 3.0 Omni-Approach Technology, powered by the VLM model, uses deep learning neural network architectures trained billions of times to develop precise object recognition and rapid contour extraction. The front structured light and TruEdge 3D Edge Sensor work in tandem to ensure the robot stays close to obstacles while cleaning edges. Real-time path planning allows the robot to detect sudden environmental changes—such as moving people or animals—and instantly react.
---
Compact but Powerful OMNI Station.
• The newly upgraded OMNI Station features Temperature-Controlled Hot Water Mop Washing 2.0, adjusting the washing temperature to match the room type and dirt level for efficient and energy-saving cleaning. Its 45°C Hot Air Drying system ensures the mop is fully dried in two hours, preventing odours and keeping it fresh. With a 150-day maintenance-free mop washing tray, users can enjoy hands-free convenience for months.
---
Warranty & After-Sales Support
• To register your e-warranty, simply scan the QR code on the warranty card included in your order.
• ECOVACS After-Sales Service Centre: 138 Joo Seng Road, #02-00, Singapore 368361.
• Service Centre Contact: +65 9230 5183 (WhatsApp messages only).
• Your order details will serve as the proof of purchase for warranty claims.

product.description:
Deodorant Stick Odor Suppression
• Neutralizes odors & eliminates 99.99% of bacteria in contact of water. (No smell in dirty water tanks like other brands)
---
TangleCut Scraper (100% Hair Cutting / Anti-Tangle)
• This advanced design precisely severs hair tangles, leaving the brush tangle-free, saving you from manual detangling troubles.
---
90°C Hot Water Wash & Dual Rotation Untangling (Intensive Cleaning)
• Tired of scrubbing dirty brushes? H14s Ultra's PTC Heater delivers up to 90°C Hot Water, rinsing the brush while rotating to remove grime.
---
90°C Hot Air Drying in 5 Mins & Dual Rotation Spinning
• High-speed dual-rotation drying followed by 5 min fast drying with stable 90°C dry, allowing the brush stays fluffy and odor-free.
---
Backward Propulsion System (GlideWheel)
• Easy to push & pull effortlessly by using Algorithm-Based GlideWheel Power System to facilitate backward movement to allow easy cleaning.
---
21,000 Pa Suction Power
• Captures all tough messes, from spaghetti & coffee beans to spills & more. Deals with various types of mess, wet or dry, surface or ground-in. Such as hair / dust / powder / particles / soy sauce / ketchup / milk / red wine / crayons.
---
180° Lie-Flat Reach - Goes Beneath. Cleans Beyond
• Effortlessly adapts to the floor, with a form that slides smoothly into tight spaces like cabinets & under sofas.
• Has an omni wheel that allows users to easily swivel left & right when you lay the vacuum flat
---
50-Minute Extended Runtime
• A durable, high-capacity battery pack eliminates low battery anxiety, delivering lasting power to clean wet and dry messes in large rooms (300m²) effortlessly.
---
Specifications:
• Runtime: 50 Min
• Clean/Used Water Tank: 780/700
• Hot Water Washing / Self-Cleaning: Yes
• Smart LED Screen / Voice Prompts / Mess Detection: Yes
• Suction Power: 18,000Pa (H13 Flex), 21,000Pa (
• TangleCut Scraper: 100% Hair Cutting
• Hot Water Wash: 90°C
• Hot Air Dry: 90°C 5mins
• 180° Lie-Flat Design / Solid-Liquid Waste Separation: Yes
• Clean/Used Water Tank: 780 / 700 ml
• Working Modes: Smart / Suction / Turbo / Quiet
• Smart LED Screen / Voice Prompts: Yes
• Self-Cleaning: Yes
---
What’s in the box:
• 1 x Main Body, Handle
• 1 x Replacement Filter
• 1 x Spare Brush Roller
• 1 x Charging Base
• 1 x Cleaning Brush
• 1 x Cleaning Solution
